summary: Julia Evans shares slides from a talk she gave about why she likes the Rust programming language. The post is extremely brief, serving mainly as a pointer to her Speaker Deck slides rather than containing substantive written content. She notes that while she normally doesn't post her slides separately, she feels these stand well on their own.
key_points: Evans gave a talk about her enthusiasm for the Rust programming language
She considers these particular slides unusually self-explanatory compared to her typical presentations
The post functions as a link to external slides rather than a standalone article
money_quotes: Normally my talk slides are unremarkable and I don't post them, but I think these mostly stand on their own and I'm happy with how they turned out.
key_insight: This is a brief pointer to talk slides about Rust rather than a substantive blog post, notable mainly as an early signal of Evans's interest in systems programming languages.
